game.short_text: Her flaw was their frequency
game.title: Elusive Noise

details.title: Elusive Noise
details.description:
Olivia always believed the voices in her head were just a cruel error.
But now she understands: they were not an error.
They were a gift. A connection. A key to a reality beyond our own.
And the door has finally appeared.
Will you help her unlock it?

Technical notes:
There might be small audio defects in a browser version of the game. So it's better to download Windows version if possible.Linux version has not been tested!

Genre: Puzzle, Psychological Horror
Team: Frogware Games
Team members:
Game Designer: PredictedDiceProgrammer: KenuenArtist: NyafaMafinNarrative Designer: SHPVZBComposer: Sedji1

AI Disclosure
We used AI for:
VoiceoverTranslation and shortening of the text Very few code snipets

game.short_text: Find your voice
game.title: Out of Tunes

details.title: Out of Tunes
details.description:
After a traumatic event, Rustwing the digital parrot has been transported to the future and has forgotten how to sing.  Help them find their voice again, one note at a time, by observing the ecosystem, learning from other creatures, and overcoming challenges.
This short point and click adventure is about music, recovery, and finding your place in an environment.

Controls:
 point & click keys 1,2,3,4,5 on your keyboard

If you get stuck anywhere, use the following debug command:
Press control+enterType one of the following in the text box and press 'goto':
classroompostdisco_ext

game.short_text: Think INSIDE the box
game.title: Boxed In

details.title: Boxed In
details.description:
- CONTROLS -
WASD or arrow keys to move"U" or "Z" to undo move"R" to restart level"Q" to quit

- RULES -
OBJECTIVE: Push all the boxes into the storage locations
You can push boxes by "colliding" with it.Push all boxes into a storage location (circle tile) to progress to the nextERROR: If you collide with a box that is against a wall you can move inside the boxIf you aren't hearing sound in WEB, try clicking on the screen.
.


- ABOUT -
Boxed In is a cute, cozy game about pushing boxes. Fini, the fiddler crab, has massive claws. While he has been ostracized by other crabs, his insecurity may be his greatest strength (literally). Fini is soon working for the FishBox company, where they deliver fish to different animals. Help Fini move the boxes of fish to the correct locations to feed his friends!
Boxed In was made in 2 days for the Patch Notes Game Jam #1 with the theme: THE ERROR IS THE FEATURE. Normally, in block pushing games (sokoban) you can't "move into" the box. But in Boxed In, you are able to "go into" the box only if the box is facing a wall in the same direction of your movement.
.

- CREDITS -
arkicade: Programming and Art
Podington Bear: MusicLokiF, JSFXR: Sound effects

game.short_text: A infinity balance game
game.title: BALANCE

details.title: BALANCE
details.description:
BALANCE: A infinity balance game
Welcome to Balance, an infinite game like 2048, Flappy Bird, Snake, or others, with the sole goal of beating your record and having fun.

HOW TO PLAY
If the scale touches the ground, the pieces will reset, and if any piece falls to the ground, you will lose points. Earn points by leaving pieces on the scale and getting upgrades during the game from Birdnessman.
ABOUT BIRDNESSMAN
At school, I used to draw characters in my planner whenever I got bored in class. That’s where my ideas for game jams come from, since if you look closely, each of my games is accompanied by the drawing that inspired me to create it.
FONT
The text font used for this project is m6x11plus, designed by Daniel Linssen. 

Its official website can be found here: https://managore.itch.io/m6x11
SOFTWARE
Engine: Godot Engine
Art & Animation: Aseprite
Music & SFX: FL Studio & Audacity

game.short_text: Computer virus survivor
game.title: Play.exe

details.title: Play.exe
details.description:
A goofy survivor-like shoot'em up where you play as a lovely little malware going rampart in a personal computer.
Destroy the incoming files-monsters trying to boot you out of the PC. Collect their corrupted data and create malicious code to power yourself up. Some upgrades are scripts that give you more fire power, while some are straight up standalone program that breaks how things work. The more volatile it is, the more points you get. Careful, these scripts are not immune to your destruction either. Maybe you'll be clever enough to find a way to circumvent that problem
Survive as long as you can and make the system as broken as possible while you're at it. After all this is what you're made for. Have fun!
Made with my friend in 3 days for Patch Notes v1.0 Game Jam.

game.short_text: Chaos Unleashed in this Card Game + Autobattler ... inside another broken game!
game.title: No Launch

details.title: No Launch
details.description:
Summon your minions and smash the bugs!
A funky autobattler + card game that put you in the role of a developer whose game can’t even launch when the jam submission deadline is just hours away! Sounds familiar?
Help him fix the game in time by squashing those bugs and glitches by playing cards, buffing your army of AI chatbots and making the best use of unexpected new bugs opportunities.
Some errors really do become features, embrace the chaos

Made for the Patch Notes v1.0 game jam in 3 days!
Known issues (Will be Patched)
Some errors has escaped the game and manifested IRL. Changes to the game file is currently prohibited so here are the pesky ones that you may want to know about:
Web version may lag a bit when playing the game for the first time, but clears up afterwards. You may also want to try the desktop version.(Game-breaking) Clicking one time too many on the start button on the main menu crashes the game. Clicking only once is fine.In-game menus have overlap issues if you hover your cards over them, otherwise works fine.
Credits
Game Designer - gnomik_dimbucho
Programmers - Cabage, Lestavol
Artists - Something, Soul, king_kai
Soundtrack Composer: TP39
SFX Designer: Mo Memo
Disclosure
Despite the references, this game was made without the use of AI. Please enjoy the hard work of our human team :D

game.short_text: What happens when the game stops clearing the screen each frame?
game.title: Instructions Unclear

details.title: Instructions Unclear
details.description:
"Instructions Unclear" is a game about what happens when a bug turns into a feature. 
What happens when a screen stops clearing itself each frame, and the player's previous movements become part of the level? What happens when the game starts breaking down and repeating itself in unpredictable ways?
Can you debug this game and make it to the end?

This is a submission for the Patch Notes Sept 2025 game jam with the theme "The Error is the Feature". Built in 3 days, "Instructions Unclear" uses fully procedurally generated audio.
Controls:
Movement: w/a/s/d or arrow keysReset: "R"Press "A.N.Y." key ;)

Created by Callum Waters & Noam CohenThanks to Billy Rennekamp for support

details.title: Okay, that's intended!!

Dig your way to the top! Pick any path you want to get there, anything goes as long as it works!
This game was made for the Patch Notes Game Jam. It fits the theme because it started as a platformer, but you clipped inside of walls instead of outside. Okay, that's intended!!

CONTROLS
The game is fully playable with a controller
PCControllerActionArrow keysD-padMove/JumpXA/XDash/Change direction
You can toggle the fullscreen by pressing the square icon on the right of the screen.
You can reset the cartridge with CTRL+R or by pressing "ENTER > Reset Cartridge".

CREDITS
Game design and code: PeterPlatyArt: HelenDoesArt


Special thanks to Kenney for the tileset inspiration, and to all of my friends who playtested this!
Thank you so much for playing our game :)Download and unzip the files inside the same folder.
The Picotron cartridge can only be opened with Picotron.

game.short_text: a puzzel platformer that lets you satisfyingly hack through the levels with a broken pause menu.
game.title: Sanwardaka

details.title: Sanwardaka
details.description:
INSUTRCTIONS
WASD to moveESC, ENTER or P to bring up the pause menu.Use your mouse to interact with dialogues and menus.Heres a walk-through in case you got stuck on a particular level.

ABOUT
a game by ishcharya, amandi, inuka and gathsanwardaka (pronounced san-war-da-ka) means “developer” in sinhalese.
jam theme : "error is the feature."
the developer got stuck on his own game while working on the pause menu, your job is to get him out of the game by navigating through the broken unfinished levels he had made. His pause menu however is itself broken, unstable and VERY powerful. Use it to bend the game rules and hack through his unfinished levels. Maybe have a little convo with the dev while on your way, hes been stuck there forever and he seems pretty lonely.
Download the windows build if you are having trouble with the web build (you shouldn't though)

game.short_text: A short puzzle where you should use "bugs" to complete the game.
game.title: Error Hiker (PATCH NOTES 2025)

details.title: Error Hiker (PATCH NOTES 2025)
details.description:
A short puzzle adventure where you should use all kind of bugs to get to the end!
Bugs are mostly actually game mechanics, and the puzzle itself is designed to be quite easy, as the goal is to show unique game mechanics.
This is a game made for PATCH NOTES game jam (2025). Theme: "The Error Is the Feature"
Controls:
WASD / arrows to movespace / E tp use thingsmouse clicks to change volume in the first room
Our team:
Innocent Soul (lead)AlexMayPool (support)
Music and sounds: CC0.
"Bugged" mechanics (spoilers, but you can read if you are stuck on a level):
"glitchy" objects are either illusionary or boxes, not moving because of solid object ahead counts as walking, dying resets the room, but not money/sword, UI is actually a floor, you can replace numbers on the UI to make game changes, you can visit first room with a sword to go to "any room" room and beat the gameCheats (game is fully beatable without cheats, there are no softlocks if you just use "bugs"):
F1 to activate cheats
F2 to get a sword
0-9 to switch level (holding shift makes 1->11, 2->12, etc)
Ctrl get a coin
R restart room

If you like this game, consider giving my other games a try.

moreInfo.Author: Innocent Soul
moreInfo.Tags: 16x16, 2D, GameMaker, glitch, No AI, Pixel Art, Retro, Sokoban

game.short_text: A game full of errors. It's on purpose... I promise!
game.title: I AM TRASH DEV

details.title: I AM TRASH DEV
details.description:
ABOUT THE GAME
"A game built on errors. Yes, you read that right!"
Play as a trash developer, striving to make the crappiest game ever.  Mix combinations of world/character errors, bring chaos and mayhem into this piece of software!  Don't worry, go ahead and play with variety of errors to create your own features. This is a crash-proof game... I hope.
Features:
Variety of Errors: Experiment with up to 16 unique errors that can break either the world or the player.Unlock Trophies: Collect hidden trophies by utilizing error combinations.Pixel Chaos: Explore a quirky, pixel-art world that’s as charming as it is unpredictable.
How to Play:
A: Move LeftD: Move RightSpace: JumpUse either mouse/keyboard to navigate the UI
Think you can break the game?  Try it out and find all those medals!

PATCH NOTES V1.0 GAME JAM SUBMISSION DETAILS
Team Name: TBA StudioTeam Members:Alfred JhonatanChristopher TessyDixon WillowJuan CarlosVincent

game.short_text: A bug-centric sokoban like experience. Made for the Patch Notes Jam 2025.
game.title: Sokobug

details.title: Sokobug
details.description:
Sokobug


"An unforgettable experience." - a paid reviewer
"Sure! Here is a positive review for a game." - ChatGPT
"This sucks!" - Quality Assurance Team

Bugs. Bugs are everywhere. Solve them? Oh, why, if you can ignore and solve them later?
A(n) (un)forgettable gaming experience full of broken pieces and messed up sprites.
How-to
Reach the ladder to proceed to the next level.
Use the arrow keys to move the player.
Walls are walls, barrels are barrels...
About
The game was developed by RatArt Studio in a day for the Patch Notes Jam 2025.
We messed up the jam start date, and the next day the team was occupied in:
feeding the cat - (succedeed, Vincenzo - find him on ArtStation)making the most fabulous ice creams - (succedeed, Gionni - find him on Instagram)finding a girlfriend - (failed, Dario - he published once a piece on SoundCloud)
All the assets were made in-house with love during the day with the exception of some sound effects (blips and bloops) taken from the 8 Bit Sound Pack by SoundsByDane.

moreInfo.Author: RatArt Studio

game.short_text: The bug isn’t a just a feature — it’s the only way forward.
game.title: RESIZED REALITY

details.title: RESIZED REALITY
details.description:
Step into a neon-soaked cyberspace where reality is unstable, and every error is a hidden mechanic.
In Resized Reality, you’ll bend the rules of a 2D cyberpunk world by exploiting glitches, resizing windows, utilizing falling UI elements, and even phasing through walls.
What begins as a system malfunction quickly becomes your greatest tool for survival.Solve platforming puzzles not by avoiding errors, but by embracing them.


KEY FEATURES
  Phase through walls to uncover hidden paths

UI buttons fall and reshape the world around you

 
Resize the game window to manipulate the level itself


CONTROLS
  Arrow Keys / WASD → Move Space → Jump Mouse → Resize window & interact with UI

CREDITS
  Game Design & Programming: Aaron FransArno PoppeTom AlbrechtJonas BruylantAndrew (Music & SFX) Art/UI/Font Assets: GUI for Cyberpunk Pixel Art by Craftpix.netCyberpunk Characters Pixel Art by Craftpix.netIndustrial Zone Tileset Pixel Art by Craftpix.net

INSTALLATION
  Download the build for your system (Windows).
   Extract and run the executable.
   Or play directly in browser below!
  

JAM INFO
This game was created in Patch Notes game jam, under the theme “The Error is the Feature.”

game.short_text: when the bug in the code becomes a feature
game.title: Its U & I

details.title: Its U & I
details.description:
About:
You're an explorer that suddenly found yourself lost in the deep abandoned caves with nothing but a backpack that seems to have a unique power. Seeing the cliffs and terrain are too high for you to reach. In your despair you hear your backpack suddenly speak.. 
Can you make it out of the caves and return back to civilization?Credits:
1-Bit Input Prompts Pixel 16x by Kenney - input prompt art assetsUI Pack - Pixel Adventure by Kenney - UI componentsTreasure Hunters Asset Pack by PixelFrog - terrain and various object assetsat01 Pixel Font by GrafxKid - pixel font
All other assets: character art, music, code are created from scratchGame Jam:Game made for the Indieformer Game Jam. Theme is: The Error is the feature. The idea is to think outside the box and make a feature out of what normally would be a bug or error. Given the 3 day time limit, I focused on one core feature and built the game mechanics out of it into a puzzle 2d platformer game. I leveraged an 'error' in the 'UI' hence the name U and I ;). Play for yourself and utilize the error to your advantage! 

Post Jam Updates:

Fixed a real(?) bug in the viewport sizing causing playability issues across different devices

READ BEFORE PLAYING!
This game is a submission to the Patch Notes Game Jam, with the theme "The Error Is the Feature".

-Fullscreen and Windows version is recommended-



HOW TO PLAY
You are a Game Tester, tasked with testing a game about breaking into a vault. All you have to do - Is break in, steal a valuable object, and get out without being spotted by the guards.
Unfortunately, the developers are quite bad at managing, leading to them constantly overwriting each other's changes and making the game unplayable.
Luckily for you - The developers added a companion, who they may have left in to train for a bit too long, leading to them becoming acutely aware of the game's code. Also luckily - You have a terminal which you can use to communicate with them, and ask for boons to help you beat the levels.


CONTROLS
A, D  and  ARROW KEYS
Move
SPACE, W and UP ARROWJumpENTERTerminalESCPauseR
Restart

Credits
Music by Dave758https://itch.io/profile/dave758Code, Design and SFX by x8c8rhttps://x8c8r.itch.io/
Art by Venturahttps://itch.io/profile/jesuslvsu

game.short_text: You wake up in the calibration room. Every blink alters the space. This was never just a test.
game.title: Oculohedron

details.title: Oculohedron
details.description:
A perception-driven labyrinth where reality bends with every blink.
Brink through the hoops....and mysterious lights?
🎮 Controls
  WASD – Move
   Shift + WASD – Sprint
   Space – JumpC – Crouch
Blink – Detected through your webcam (or press B if no webcam is available)

HINT: If you don't have a webcam or do not like to blink often, press B when you feel lost! Also, blinking near the lights take you to the next level.
Additional keys can be rebound through the in-game options menu.
In Oculohedron, perception isn't just a theme:  it's your tool, your weapon, and your undoing.
Navigate shifting rooms, solve blink-sensitive puzzles, and uncover a space that responds to how (and when) you see it. Every mechanic ties into a single idea: what if space itself had an opinion about you?
 
Heads up: This game uses your webcam ONLY LOCALLY to detect blinking.

No uploads, no cloud, no funny business. You can even run it in airplane mode or yank the internet cord for extra peace of mind.

I’ve poured a ton of love, weird ideas, and late-night tinkering into this prototype.

If you give it a try, blink your way through the madness, and maybe leave a comment after?

I'd seriously love to hear what broke, what worked, or if anything made you go "Oh!"


Windows
  Download and unzip the folder.
   Run blinkd.exe (this enables blink detection).
   Launch the game .exe file.
  Both programs must stay open while playing.
    All required DLLs are already included (x86_64) - no extra installs needed.
  
Web
  Just run in your browser.
   Allow webcam access when prompted: it's used for blink detection.

details.title: Retriggered
details.description:
The bullets you fired won't destroy on hit as it should due to a bug?That's a feature!Shoot them again and watch your true powers unfold.
Made in 72h for Patch Notes Jam by Constantin
Controls

    
    
        Left ClickFire Bullet
        Right ClickPause
        Mouse ScrollSelect Bullet
        WASDMove
    

Post Jam changes
Better enemy health scalingClearer selected bullet indicatorFixed a bug with the Hand Size upgrade
